description: Apply Dagster AutomationConditions broadly via selection rules with fall-through priority. Per-asset settings preserved by default. Supports cron, presets, and derive-from-upstreams modes.

preserve_existing.label: Preserve Existing
preserve_existing.description: If true, assets with their own automation_condition are NOT overwritten.

rules.label: Rules
rules.description: Ordered list — first selection-match wins. Each rule needs `selection` + one of `cron` / `preset` / `derive_from_upstreams`.

name: Automation Condition Applicator
